title: config: add support for StopSignal
body:
Add a stop-singnal option for buildah-config.

Signed-off-by: Zhou Hao <zhouhao@cn.fujitsu.com>

comments.body: Ditto @ripcurld's thought on test.  The test failures don't seem to be related to this PR, looks like some kind of unrelated issue on the test systems.  @q384566678 thanks for the PR!
Lets get this in ASAP,  Now that we have Multi-stage builds we want to cut a new release and this is something we should support.
A good test would be to just check buildah inspect to make sure the stop signal is set.
Test issues should be fixed with #572
@q384566678 Could you update your PR to pull in the fix for the docker change.
I updated the explanation and added related tests.

@q384566678 I think you figured it out, but docker no longer wants you to do `--password foobar` on the command line.

LGTM

:pushpin: Commit 7ddf667 has been approved by `rhatdan`
